title: Publish Taskulus Rust crate to crates.io
description: Prepare crate metadata, versions, CI workflows, and release steps to publish Taskulus to crates.io (after config parity and dotyaml crate available).
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Documented steps to publish Taskulus Rust crate: ensure metadata/license/readme in rust/Cargo.toml, run cargo package --locked to verify contents, then cargo publish --locked with CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN set.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Crate published to crates.io with latest release; installable via 'cargo install taskulus'; publishing steps documented.
custom.beads_notes:
Starting work to publish Rust crate; will verify package metadata, version, and credentials.
Crate published as taskulus 0.1.0 on crates.io; see tskl-pjb.4 notes. Next: tag release if desired.
